description_long: This is a medium-sized, two-story house with a symmetrical facade and a prominent central entryway. The exterior walls are painted white, and the roof is a warm brown gable style with visible chimneys. The front features a series of evenly spaced windows arranged in symmetrical rows, and the entryway is accentuated by a small porch with steps and columns. The house sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, suggesting a suburban or residential neighborhood setting. Architectural details such as the window trim and the balanced proportions evoke a classic Colonial style.
description: A two-story white Colonial-style house with a brown gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a central entry porch on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, central entry porch, and evenly spaced windows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the house and the brown gable roof with visible chimneys.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the house, with fewer visible details and windows.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the side elevation, roofline, and part of the entry porch.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with small porch, steps, and columns
